h2: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North
homepage.text_excerpt: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Alice Macdonald Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North As your MP, I will: Be your strong voice in parliament Be a full-time MP Always listen to you Champion our great county and fine city Always be honest with you get In Touch About Alice Alice is the Labour and Co-operative Member of Parliament for Norwich North. Alice grew up in West Norfolk and lives in Norwich North. Immediately before her election to parliament, Alice was a charity leader running a global campaign against hunger. Alice has more than 15 years’ experience in international development having held previous roles at Save the Children and the not for profit Project Everyone leading campaigns to tackle poverty, inequality and climate change. She has also worked overseas including in South Africa and Rwanda. Alice also has a track record of serving communities. She was a councillor for 5 years including Cabinet member for Equalities and Leisure and is currently a trustee of Dawn’s New Horizon a domestic abuse charity based in Norwich North. Alice has already fought for change in Norwich North, including successfully campaigning to keep the NHS walk-in centre open. She is committed to being a visible, active and accessible MP and standing up for Norwich North. During the campaign Alice set out 5 priorities that she will focus on. These are underpinned by action to tackle the biggest challenges we face – the cost of living and the climate crises: Action to lower your bills through investment in clean energy. Cutting NHS waiting lists and improving access to NHS doctors and dentists. Good affordable homes with the right infrastructure and great public transport Increased opportunity- securing new green jobs, backing local businesses and fighting for a great education for every child. Cutting crime and anti-social behaviour with more police on our streets. Stay In Touch Hear from Alice Latest News Events Listening Survey Sign Up To My Newsletter Sign up here to receive my newsletter, campaigns and stay up to date with my work for you Full Name Phone number Email First line of address Postcode SIGN UP See the Latest from Alice Keep up to date with the work I am doing in Norwich North – Click below to read my latest news. Latest News Upcoming Events Keep an eye on the calendar to see all my upcoming Constituency Surgeries. To speak with me at my surgeries: please send an email to contact@alicemacdonald.org , providing your name, contact details, and preferred time slot. view all events May 2026 May 27 27 May 6:00 pm - 7:30 pm Anti-Social Behaviour Surgery Find out more Complete My Listening Survey Complete my Listening Survey, so I can better understand the issues concerning you most. Complete The Survey Follow Alice Latest News Summer School 2026 Read More My March Newsletter Read More Inclusivity in Sports Read More See All News My Promise To You Trust in politics is at an all-time low and I can understand why many people simply don’t feel politics works for them. I will work my hardest to restore trust and show that politicians are not all the same. That’s why I have been out and about speaking to so many people across Norwich North to hear your concerns. As your MP, I will: Be your strong voice in parliament – speaking up on the issues that matter to you. Be a full-time MP – unlike many, I would never take a second job. Always listen to you – I hold regular constituency surgeries as well as being visible and accessible. Champion our great county and fine city – I’m proud to be from Norfolk and will stand up for investment in our area. And I’ll always be honest with you – I won’t make promises I can’t keep. Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North Facebook Twitter Instagram Promoted by David Fullman on behalf of Alice Macdonald MP both at St Marks Church Hall, Hall Road, Norw

pages.title: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North

headings: h2: My Priorities for Norwich North
h3: As your MP, I will:
h2: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North
pages.text_excerpt: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Campaigns My Priorities for Norwich North During my election campaign, I set out my key priorities: Health, Homes, and Opportunity for the people of Norwich North. These remain at the heart of my work as your MP. Health Fixing Our Broken NHS Health and access to quality healthcare are the number one concerns I hear on the doorstep. The NHS has been left broken by the Tories and I am committed, alongside the new Labour government, to repairing it. Fighting to save the Norwich Walk-In Centre , which provides essential healthcare access. Addressing the “Sahara of dental deserts” by supporting a new dental school at UEA . My Health Campaign Homes Tackling the Housing Crisis Norwich is experiencing a housing crisis , with too many struggling to find affordable homes. I am pushing, alongside the Labour-led City Council and Clive Lewis MP , to ensure affordable housing is included in the redevelopment of Anglia Square . The new government is prioritizing house building , and I will work to ensure Norwich North gets its fair share of affordable homes. Housing Campaign Opportunity A Better Future for Our Children For far too long, equal opportunities for our children have been out of reach . I am committed to ensuring our education system delivers , especially for young people with additional needs . That’s why I am pushing for the repurposing of Angel Road Junior School as a specialist SEND school to support children with additional needs and ease the pressure on the system . Opportunity Campaign My Promise To You Trust in politics is at an all-time low and I can understand why many people simply don’t feel politics works for them. I will work my hardest to restore trust and show that politicians are not all the same. That’s why I have been out and about speaking to so many people across Norwich North to hear your concerns. As your MP, I will: Be your strong voice in parliament – speaking up on the issues that matter to you. Be a full-time MP – unlike many, I would never take a second job. Always listen to you – I hold regular constituency surgeries as well as being visible and accessible. Champion our great county and fine city – I’m proud to be from Norfolk and will stand up for investment in our area. And I’ll always be honest with you – I won’t make promises I can’t keep. Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North Facebook Twitter Instagram Promoted by David Fullman on behalf of Alice Macdonald MP both at St Marks Church Hall, Hall Road, Norwich, NR1 3HL. pages.text_excerpt: Alice Macdonald for Norwich North Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Upcoming Events Keep an eye on the calendar for upcoming Constituency Surgeries. My constituency surgeries are open to all constituents of Norwich North who need support or assistance with issues in their daily lives. I am always here to listen. Please book a slot by calling 01603 733182 or emailing alice.macdonald.mp@parliament.uk To speak with me at my surgeries: please send an email to alice.macdonald.mp@parliament.uk providing your name, contact details, and preferred time slot. pages.title: contactmp - Alice Macdonald
headings: h2: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North
pages.text_excerpt: contactmp - Alice Macdonald Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Contact Alice HOW CAN ALICE HELP? Parliamentary rules mean Alice can only respond to and support constituents living in Norwich North. We need your email, phone number and address so we can contact you. If you live outside the constituency, you can find your Member of Parliament’s details by visiting http://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP I live in Norwich North and need help from Alice I'm from a community group, charity or business based in Norwich North and need help from Alice I'm from an organisation or business who is seeking to discuss policy or national/local issues with Alice Something else Consent I give Alice Macdonald permission to contact me using data I've supplied. Opt-out at any time, see my Privacy Policy. SUBMIT Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North Facebook Twitter Instagram Promoted by David Fullman on behalf of Alice Macdonald MP both at St Marks Church Hall, Hall Road, Norwich, NR1 3HL. pages.title: Anti-Social Behaviour Surgery - Alice Macdonald
headings: h2: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North
pages.text_excerpt: Anti-Social Behaviour Surgery - Alice Macdonald Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Anti-Social Behaviour Surgery BACK TO NEWS The office is holding an anti-social behaviour specific surgery on Wednesday 27th May from 6-7:30pm, to support constituents dealing with ASB issues in their local area. This event will take place in the Catton Grove area, but anyone living in Norwich North is welcome to attend. Email alice.macdonald.mp@parliament.uk to register your interest in attending. Participants will be offered a slot with one of the office caseworkers, and the location of the event will be shared with attendees closer to the date of the event.
